zh.Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾格利斯索普
zh.Morpath, Northumberlandshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Greystoke於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可時，他的父親Thomas de Greystoke37歲，母親Christian Veteripont32歲。他和Agnes Longvillers Greystoke至少有2個女兒。他去世於1270年11月11日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Greystoke于大约1225年出生在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可时，他的父亲Thomas de Greystoke37岁，母亲Christian Veteripont32岁。他和Agnes Longvillers Greystoke至少有2个女儿。他去世于1270年11月11日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Greystoke was born about 1225, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Greystoke, was 37 and his mother, Christian Veteripont, was 32. He had at least 2 daughters with Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. He died after 11 November 1270, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Greystoke est né environ 1225, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Greystoke, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Christian Veteripont, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. Il est décédé après 11 novembre 1270, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Greystoke um 1225 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Greystoke 37 und seine Mutter Christian Veteripont 32. Er hatte mit Agnes Longvillers Greystoke mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 11. November 1270 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Greystoke è nato il circa 1225 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Greystoke, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Christian Veteripont, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. Morì dopo il 11 novembre 1270, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Greystokeが約1225年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Greystokeは37歳，母Christian Veteripontは32歳であった。彼はAgnes Longvillers Greystokeとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1270年11月11日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Greystoke(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Greystoke(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Veteripont(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Agnes Longvillers Greystoke(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 11월 11일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Greystoke, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Christian Veteripont, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. Ele faleceu após 11 de novembro de 1270, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Greystoke родился около 1225 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Greystoke было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Veteripont, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. Он умер после 11 ноябрь 1270 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1225, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Greystoke, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Christian Veteripont, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Agnes Longvillers Greystoke. Murió después de 11 de noviembre de 1270, en su pueblo.
